name: garmin-connect
description: Garmin Connect source semantics and live access for training readiness and activity context.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch and interpret Garmin Connect health, readiness, and activity data.
interface.longDescription: Garmin Connect provides source-specific guidance for using gccli-backed Garmin health, readiness, Body Battery, Training Readiness, Training Status, and activity metadata. Local persistence and cross-source analysis live outside the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Fetch Garmin Connect readiness data for today.
Help me interpret Garmin Training Readiness and Body Battery.
